# Lynx 2

## Ultimate Device Customization for iOS 14, 15 & 16

**Requires Cephei**

On iOS 12 or 13? Try out Lynx

## What's New - Version 2.5.4

### Changes
- Added option to allow Always On Display while in Low Power Mode, when a Focus is enabled, and while connected to CarPlay (iPhone 14/15 Pro (Max))
- Added option to hide black background from Timer live activity on Lockscreen (iOS 16+)
- Added options to set CarPlay icon label font size and family
- Added option to use average icon color as badge background color in CarPlay (iOS 16+)
- Added fully localized search function to main settings page and each section. Pull down to show search bar
- Added option to set scroll Now Playing track title in CarPlay when title size doesn't fit screen

### Fixes
- Fixed disabling wallpaper switcher gesture on Lockscreen (iOS 16)
- Fixed Lock App shortcut appearing on widget icon menus
